page_content:
JOUR199 Survey Apprenticeship (1 Credit)

College-monitored experience in approved mass-communications organizations and industries.

Prerequisite: Permission of JOUR-Philip Merrill College of Journalism. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

Formerly: JOUR198.

JOUR200 Journalism History, Roles and Structures (3 Credits) Introduction to the study of journalism from the standpoint of media history and sociology.
